title: pelargonium anauris
intro: Pelargonium anauris, also known as Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium anauris include relief from colds and flu, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
